items.name: Handala (Iran-linked hacktivist group)
items.targets: Stryker Corporation (US medical device manufacturer), Verifone, Israeli security institute personnel (Raz Zimmt). Conducted wiper attacks affecting 200K+ devices causing global network disruption.
items.ttps: T1485 (Data Destruction via wiper malware), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1566 (Phishing), psychological warfare operations including fake shelter danger calls

items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: Telus Digital (Canadian, claiming 1 petabyte data theft), Salesforce Experience Cloud sites in mass-scanning campaign using modified AuraInspector tool
items.ttps: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application), T1530 (Data from Cloud Storage Object), T1213 (Data from Information Repositories), mass scanning and data exfiltration

items.name: CLOP (ransomware)
items.targets: AIGHEALTHCARE.IN compromised and listed on leak site
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service)

items.name: Qilin (ransomware)
items.targets: TDS Construction, Silvon Software Group posted as new victims
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1567.002 (Exfiltration to Cloud Storage)

items.name: Akira (ransomware)
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery), T1021 (Remote Services)

items.name: Everest (ransomware)
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1567 (Exfiltration Over Web Service), T1005 (Data from Local System)

items.name: Coinbase Cartel (ransomware)
items.ttps: T1486 (Data Encrypted for Impact), T1490 (Inhibit System Recovery)

items.name: BeatBanker / BTMOB (Android malware)
items.targets: Android users targeted with banking Trojan, crypto miner and RAT deployment via phishing
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1106 (Native API for crypto mining), T1414 (Clipboard Modification), T1417 (Input Capture), T1409 (Stored Application Data)

items.name: Unknown TA (OAuth Device Code Abuse)
items.targets: Microsoft 365 accounts hijacked through OAuth device code flow abuse without password theft
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1528 (Steal Application Access Token), T1098 (Account Manipulation), bypasses MFA

items.name: Unknown TA (Cloudflare Anti-Bot Abuse)
items.targets: Microsoft 365 credential theft using Cloudflare anti-bot features to hide phishing pages
items.ttps: T1566.002 (Spearphishing Link), T1598 (Phishing for Information), T1027 (Obfuscated Files or Information)

items.name: Unknown TA (IPv6 Phishing)
items.targets: Free toothbrush scam emails using IPv6 trick to hide malicious links
items.ttps: T1566.002 (Spearphishing Link), T1027 (Obfuscated Files or Information), T1583.008 (Acquire Infrastructure: Malvertising)

items.name: Unknown TA (Malicious ISO Resumés)
items.targets: Canadian organizations receiving resumés with malicious ISO attachments per Aryaka warning
items.ttps: T1566.001 (Spearphishing Attachment), T1204.002 (User Execution: Malicious File), T1553.005 (Subvert Trust Controls: Mark-of-the-Web Bypass)

items.name: Unknown TA (AWS AiTM)
items.targets: AWS accounts hijacked using adversary-in-the-middle phishing kit with typosquatted domains
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1557 (Adversary-in-the-Middle), T1586.002 (Compromise Accounts: Email Accounts), T1583.001 (Acquire Infrastructure: Domains)

items.name: DarkWebInformer (threat intelligence source)
items.targets: Reporting on: HB Brantner (Austrian trailer manufacturer) alleged breach with customer data and NDAs exfiltrated; 26,500 exposed IoT devices and 3,000 RTSP cameras in Saudi Arabia listed for free download; Viking Line Ferries allegedly breached with passenger database and payment data leaked; South Korean government server root access being sold with lateral movement to 42 internal hosts
items.ttps: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application), T1078 (Valid Accounts), T1021 (Remote Services), T1018 (Remote System Discovery)

items.name: China-nexus Actors
items.targets: Shift focus to Qatar amid Iranian conflict per reporting
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1583 (Acquire Infrastructure), T1590 (Gather Victim Network Information)

items.name: Russia and China APTs
items.targets: Finland warns of cyber espionage operations targeting Finnish tech sector
items.ttps: T1566 (Phishing), T1071 (Application Layer Protocol), T1041 (Exfiltration Over C2 Channel), T1592 (Gather Victim Host Information)

canada_landscape.summary: Canadian organizations faced significant breaches in the past 48 hours. Loblaw suffered a data breach exposing sensitive customer information, while Telus Digital confirmed a breach after ShinyHunters claimed theft of 1 petabyte of data. Canadian organizations are also being targeted with malicious ISO-attachment resumés per Aryaka warnings, and Meta disabled 150K accounts linked to Southeast Asia scam centers with Canadian connections.
canada_landscape.retailers: Loblaw (major Canadian grocer/retailer) suffered data breach exposing sensitive customer information; Canada Goose compromised by Coinbase Cartel ransomware group
